overarchingPrinciples: No passive surfacing — all data surfaces must require action
AUTOMATION ALWAYS — manual processes are a bug, not a feature
Warnings are calls to action, not informational — deferrals are last resort

Actionable = results. Not acknowledgment, not informational surfacing.
No deferrals unless user explicitly asks (D18).
AI-optimized — all formats, scoring, and outputs optimized for AI consumption (D24/D25/D30).
